overall.description: A slow cinematic exploration of a gothic wizarding common room (Slytherin house from Hogwarts Legacy), featuring vaulted stone ceilings, green draped four-poster beds, and an ornate stained glass dome. The camera moves smoothly forward and tilts upward to reveal the intricate ceiling architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic wizarding common room with house beds

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the common room observing the green-draped beds and central fire pit

entered.detail: four-poster bed with dark green curtains and wooden frame
four-poster bed with dark green curtains and wooden frame
ornate metal cage containing glowing embers in the center of the room
tall pointed stone archway leading to a darker corridor
intricate ribbed stone vaulting with greenish patina

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through the dimly lit gothic common room, revealing green-draped four-poster beds on either side and a central fire brazier. The stone vaulted ceiling and ornate arches frame the space as the camera advances toward the far doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: vaulted ceiling with stained glass dome

events.description: camera tilts upward from ground level to focus on the ceiling architecture
stained glass dome becomes centered, casting colored light through the intricate patterns

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to examine the intricate stained glass dome and ribbed vault ceiling details

entered.detail: large circular stained glass skylight with intricate geometric patterns and blue-green tint
decorative stone ribbing extending from the arches toward the central dome
decorative stone ribbing extending from the arches toward the central dome

segments.scene_description: As the camera tilts upward, the focus shifts from the room's furnishings to the magnificent stained glass dome and gothic ribbed vaulting overhead. The beds and fire pit exit the frame below while the intricate stonework and colored glass become the central visual elements, filling the view with detailed architectural patterns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a ground-level exploration of a gothic common room to a soaring view of its ornate ceiling. It begins by gliding forward through the dimly lit space, passing green-draped four-poster beds and a central fire brazier framed by stone vaulted arches. As the camera advances toward the far doorway, the perspective smoothly tilts upward, causing the room's furnishings to slide out of frame. The scene then expands to reveal the magnificent stained glass dome and intricate ribbed vaulting overhead, filling the view with detailed architectural patterns and colored light.
